name: Cardio
comment: Extended low-intensity session (6.3hrs) consistent with a karate seminar or long training day — high calorie burn reflects duration rather than intensity. 34% Z1 and predominantly sub-Z3 HR confirms mostly aerobic work with occasional bursts to 163bpm. Good recovery capacity demonstrated: RHR the following morning (58bpm) was only mildly elevated, returning to baseline within 48 hours.
